name: Death World
desc: A world that subjects citizens to harsh environments while training and recruiting a large number of marines.

name: Forge World
desc: A world dedicated to mass-producing high-quality ships and weapons.

name: Fortress World
desc: A world dedicated to defending star systems and staging attacks against hostiles.

name: Paradise World
desc: A world dedicated to commerce and trade, mostly inhabited by executives and nobility.

name: Hive World
desc: A world dedicated to increasing the population as fast and as much as possible.

name: Waste World
desc: A world dedicated to being a dumping ground for waste from other worlds.
